element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns weapon switching and basic combat mechanics
Player discovers flatulence penalty and stealth implications; learns resource management
Player learns damage reduction tradeoff against loss of motor control and drunk meter effects
Player learns temporary advantage with dual meter reset mechanic
Progressive enemy type introduction establishes alien invasion threat
Introduces thematic narrative element—familiar enemies add dark comedy
First major skill test; requires weapon mastery and resource discipline
Campaign climax; comprehensive test of all learned mechanics

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical tension with resource management pacing; power-up consumption creates risk-reward decision windows that interrupt combat flow

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Food and alcohol pickups scattered throughout; player must explore to find reserves for health management

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-like introduction to weapon variety and basic power-up mechanics; low alien/clone density
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating alien and clone encounters; introduction of boss Assface; resource scarcity increases strategic pressure
difficulty_curve.late_game: Heavy enemy density; Queen Vixen final boss requires mastery of health management and combat discipline
notable_spikes: First Assface boss encounter (mid-game skill gate)
Sections with high drunk/gut meter penalties overlapping combat requirements

notable_level_patterns.description: Industrial setting establishing thematic contrast between rural americana and alien invasion; tight corridors favor melee and shotgun combat
Open residential space allowing varied approach options; scattered resources encourage exploration
Areas forcing player to navigate without reliable health restoration; teaches resource discipline and enemy avoidance
Contained spaces (Assface and Queen Vixen encounters) with predictable sightlines; emphasizes direct combat over mobility
